name: Honey Crunch Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. For the crust: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and salt. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender or 2 knives until mixture is uniform. Sprinkle in water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until dough forms a ball. On lightly floured surface, roll the crust into a circle about 1/8 inch thick and approximately 1-1/2 inches larger than an inverted 9-inch pie plate. Gently ease dough into the pie plate, being careful not to stretch the dough. Fold the pastry edge under to make a double thickness around the rim; flute as desired.
3. For the filling: In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except pecans. Mix well. Fold in chopped pecans and spoon the filling into the unbaked pastry shell. Bake at 350 degrees F for 50 to 55 minutes.
4. During the last 30 minutes of baking, cover the edge of the pastry shell with aluminum foil to prevent over-browning.
5. For the topping: In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and honey. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves, about 2 to 3 minutes. Stir constantly. Add pecan halves and stir until the nuts are well coated. During the last 10 minutes of baking, remove the pie from the oven; spread the topping evenly over the top. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 10 to 12 minutes, or until the topping is bubbly and golden brown.
